message:
feat(fsfs): implement incremental change detection contract and fix Eq derives

Two logically related changes across the fsfs schema crate:

1. Incremental change detection (incremental_change.rs, ~400 new lines):
   Implement the fsfs-incremental-change-detection-contract v1 that was
   previously defined only in schemas/docs. Adds:
   - Kind constants and event/detection/queue-action string constants
   - FastpathPolicy, HashPolicy, RenameMovePolicy, RecoveryPolicy with
     Default impls encoding production-safe defaults
   - ContractDefinition top-level schema with all sub-policies
   - ChangeDecision event type for per-file change verdicts
   - RecoveryCheckpoint for crash-restart state persistence
   - Comprehensive unit tests covering serde round-trips, default
     values, and contract-level invariants

2. Derive attribute corrections across 15+ fsfs schema files:
   - Add missing Eq derives to structs that are purely string/integer
     (bead_self_doc, control_plane, control_plane_error, crate_registry,
     determinism, expected_loss, file_classification, high_cost_artifact,
     interaction_matrix, packaging, privacy, provenance, root_discovery,
     snippet_provenance, telemetry, telemetry_transport)
   - Remove incorrect Eq from enums containing f64-adjacent generics
     (alien_recommendations Subsystem/ManifestField)
   - Fix in_memory.rs minor derive alignment

These changes close bead bd-d2w0 (Missing Parity: Incremental Change
Detection Contract).

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
